name: claude-code-adversarial-review
description: Ask Claude Code to adversarially review Codex changes, then verify the findings.

interface.shortDescription: Have Claude Code review Codex changes, then verify each finding.
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Adversarial Review gives Codex a non-blocking cross-review workflow: package Codex changes for Claude Code adversarial review, collect Claude's findings when available, verify every finding at file and line level, separate true defects from false positives, and continue Codex flow when Claude is rate-limited, unavailable, or asks a question.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude Code Adversarial Review on my Codex changes
Ask Claude Code to review this diff, then verify the findings
Run Claude Code adversarial review on this TODO section
